H2.name: H2
H2.description: Extremely flammable gas. Can form explosive mixtures with air. Colorless and odorless.

Cl2.name: Cl2
Cl2.description: Highly toxic yellow-green gas. Causes severe respiratory damage. Heavier than air.

HCl.name: HCl
HCl.description: Strong corrosive acid. Fumes cause severe burns to skin and eyes.

NH3.name: NH3
NH3.description: Pungent, suffocating odor. Highly irritating to eyes and respiratory system.

HF.name: HF
HF.description: Highly corrosive. Penetrates skin and attacks bone calcium. Fatal if not treated.

H2S.name: H2S
H2S.description: Smells like rotten eggs. Paralyzes the sense of smell at high concentrations. Fatal.

H2SO4_D.name: H2SO4 (Dilute)
H2SO4_D.description: Powerful dehydrating agent. Causes severe chemical burns.

COCl2.name: COCl2
COCl2.description: Used as a chemical weapon in WWI. Smells like freshly cut grass. Delayed lung edema.

MIXED.name: Mixed Leak
MIXED.description: Complex mixture of industrial chemicals. High risk of secondary reactions.

H2SO4_F.name: H2SO4 (Full)
H2SO4_F.description: Concentrated sulfuric acid leak. Destroys everything in its path.

H.name: H
H.description: Highly reactive atomic hydrogen. Seeking stabilization.

HSO4-.name: HSO4-
HSO4-.description: Intermediate product of sulfuric acid ionization.

SO42-.name: SO42-
SO42-.description: Final stable state of neutralized sulfuric acid.
